sections.paragraph:
- Original: στρουθίον

- Transliteration: Strouthion

- Phonetic: stroo-thee'-on

- Definition:

1. a little bird, esp. of the sparrow sort, a sparrow

- Origin: diminutive of strouthos (a sparrow)

- TDNT entry: 19:10,1

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: Diminutive of στρουθός strouthos (a sparrow); a little sparrow: - sparrow.
